name: Identify file types
description: Applying a process that identifies the types of files.
details: This could be via extension, although files may have been renamed, and so this is unreliable, so other means such as examining a file signature or other techniques are used (Dubettier et al 2023)

references.relevance_summary_280: Specifies 'File Type Identification' as a fairly central part of the abstract tool model in Fig 1. That stage is described in detail in 4.7 and mentions both identification by extension and content.
